---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Continuity
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case? (e.g. coordinating a
particular workflow across parallel sessions.)

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Flavor

Which flavor does this apply to?

- [ ] Local (SQLite)
- [ ] Team (Worker + Neon)
- [ ] Both

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, related tools, links, or how this fits the
`ContinuityBackend` seam (changes generally need to work in both backends).
